title: 100Follower Bedwars pack!
description: This is a bedwars pack i made for my 100th follower goal on twitch! its a simple bedwars pack and part of my simple bedwars collection ive started!
body:
Thank you all for 100 followers on twitch! im so happy i've gotten this far. This pack is my best so far! it contains several new fetures including: 

    See through leaves with simple 'clean' outlines that make it easy to both view other players through them while still being easily locatable.

  Diamonds are Red!

  Emeralds are Blue!

  64x breaking animation! 

  Seethrough GUI!

  124x armor!

  (no skybox yet)
